name: opportunities.source.crawl-tick
description: Every 15 min — dispatches due sources for crawling. POSTs /admin/sources/crawl-due, which lists sources whose next_crawl_at has passed and emits one crawl.requests.v1 each (backpressure-gated, batched), pushing next_crawl_at forward so a source isn't re-dispatched before its crawl completes. This is the single reliable crawl driver; it replaces the per-source dynamic Trustage workflows.
